name: TRIGGER2MARKER
description: Interactive tool to decode 8-bit trigger codes to markers for actiCHamp amplifiers. Simulates Digital Port Settings behavior.

name: EEG Quality Control
description: Automated EEG quality assessment pipeline — detects artifacts, noise, and bad channels using MNE and autoreject.

name: BVEF2LSL Config
description: Convert BrainVision Electrode Files to Lab Streaming Layer configurations for real-time EEG streaming.
